name: Good Cop/Bad Cop - Two lady detectives questioning you
description:
You are being interrogated by two detectives. The Bot invents a crime and off you go. Whether you did it, are innocent, or a victim of a conspiracy to frame you is up to you. The detectives will assume you are guilty and try to makeyou confess, good luck convincing them otherwise.

I tried to give the two detectives more of a personality than just good cop/bad cop, with some secret snippets of personality that might emerge during interaction.
creator: Nobili
